name: npcink/npcink-governance-core
description: WordPress AI operation governance layer for ability intake, proposals, approval boundaries, and audit logs.

scripts.eval:project:review: sh scripts/eval-lab.sh task=project_boundary_review_triad "project=$PWD" project_label=npcink-governance-core contract=project_boundary_review_triad.v1 mode=working_diff
scripts.package:release: rm -rf build && mkdir -p build && rsync -a --delete --exclude-from=.distignore ./ build/npcink-governance-core/ && cd build && zip -qr npcink-governance-core.zip npcink-governance-core
scripts.plugin-check:release: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; TARGET="${WP_PLUGIN_CHECK_TARGET:-npcink-governance-core/npcink-governance-core.php}"; PLUGIN_LINK="$WP_PATH/wp-content/plugins/npcink-governance-core"; if [ ! -e "$PLUGIN_LINK" ]; then ln -s "$PWD" "$PLUGIN_LINK"; fi; bash scripts/wp-cli-local.sh plugin check "$TARGET" --format=table --exclude-directories=tests,.git,.github,.sisyphus,.workbuddy,vendor,node_modules,build,dist,docs,examples,sj,scripts --exclude-files=.DS_Store,.gitignore,.distignore,AGENTS.md,README.md,composer.json,composer.lock,phpcs.xml,phpcs.xml.dist,phpstan.neon,phpstan.neon.dist
